string.name: name
string.value: Searching for Remnants of the Dragon Master 4
Search for remnants of Dragon Master Evan
Find an #b#t4032536##k in Maple World and bring it to #bCassandra#k.
You discovered an #b#t4032536##k, a remnant of Dragon Master Evan.
It's that time again. I don't have to tell you, right? You have to find another remnant.
The remnant that you'll have to find this time is an #b#t4032536##k. It looks different from the footprint you found last time so pay attention.
You've done so much already, don't give up now! Just imagine the great #bDragon Equipment#k you'll get!
Did you bring the #b#t4032536##k that I asked for?
Yes, this is it. This is a footprint found in a different area than the last one. Good job. The time of the Dragon Master's revival is close at hand. See you soon!
Hmm... You didn't bring back the #b#t4032536##k. Hurry up and go find it.
